narrative:
Liberty Ne (precinct in Hancock County) has 790 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.9 percentage points.
